data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Changes applied to CLAUDE.md — 3 sprint target references updated: 'Run epics end-to-end' → 'Run primary tickets end-to-end', 'Use /dso:sprint for epics' → 'Use /dso:sprint for primary tickets', 'Epics: Use /dso:sprint' → 'Primary tickets: Use /dso:sprint'. All 'epic' references to the ticket type specifically left unchanged.
